use_cases: Displaying keyboard shortcuts in documentation and help sections
Showing keyboard combinations in UI tutorials and tooltips
Representing keyboard input in form fields and search interfaces
Visual keyboard indicators in accessible interfaces
Shortcuts display in software applications and command palettes
ai_summary: A keyboard key display component from shadcn/ui that renders keyboard keys and key combinations with consistent styling. Uses Radix UI's Slot for composition flexibility and Tailwind for styling. Part of shadcn's design system with clean, minimal aesthetics suitable for documentation, tutorials, and UI overlays.
